Welcome to Royal Design

Create stunning websites on GitHub Pages with elegant purple aesthetics

✨

Beautiful Design

Crafted with elegance and attention to every detail. Premium aesthetics that impress.

⚡

Lightning Fast

Optimized for GitHub Pages free hosting. No build tools required, pure performance.

🎨

Fully Customizable

CSS variables make theming a breeze. Change colors, fonts, and spacing instantly.

♿

Accessible

WCAG AA compliant. Keyboard navigation, screen reader friendly, proper color contrast.

📱

Mobile First

Designed to work beautifully on all screen sizes, from phones to desktops.

🔒

Secure & Free

Host on GitHub Pages with zero infrastructure costs. HTTPS included automatically.

🚀

Easy Deployment

Git push to deploy. Built-in CI/CD with GitHub Actions. No complex setup required.
